message:
feat(fp-io): SqlConnection::list_tables for backend-agnostic table discovery (br-vhq2 / fd90.20)

Add list_tables(schema: Option<&str>) -> Vec<String> trait method.
Default impl returns empty Vec for backends that can't introspect.
rusqlite override queries sqlite_master, excluding internal sqlite_*
tables and ignoring the schema arg (single-namespace backend).

Free-fn list_sql_tables(conn, schema) wraps the trait call at the
fp-io top level; re-exported via the frankenpandas umbrella along
with SqlInsertMethod which was missing from prior export pass.

6 new tests cover: empty DB, populated DB sorted, internal-table
exclusion, schema-Some silently-ignored on SQLite, default-impl
returns empty, multi-schema stub routing.

291 fp-io tests pass; clippy -D warnings clean across fp-io +
umbrella; ubs Critical=0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,10 +62,12 @@ pub use fp_io::{
     SqlChunkIterator,
     SqlConnection,
     SqlIfExists,
+    SqlInsertMethod,
     SqlIndexedChunkIterator,
     SqlQueryResult,
     SqlReadOptions,
     SqlWriteOptions,
+    list_sql_tables,
     read_csv,
     read_csv_str,
     read_csv_with_options,
